proofLevels.0: Discovery Proven: inventory confidence only; no execution guarantees
proofLevels.1: Executable Proven: proof command executes successfully with expected output and no crash
proofLevels.3: Behaviour Proven: before/after state, state diff, side effects, failure path, audit, metric, trace, tenancy, security, and deterministic replay evidence
proofLevels.4: Substrate Proven: same behavioural proof executed against Compose-backed real local substrate after L3 closure
proofLevels.5: Resilience Proven: L4 plus restart, timeout, retry, concurrency, recovery, backup/restore, degraded-mode, and failure-injection evidence
proofLevels.6: Foundation Proven: L5 plus tenancy, security, observability, operational recovery, lifecycle governance, and ownership

minimumDefinition.unitProof: unit test or explicit n/a with rationale
minimumDefinition.integrationProof: integration/substrate proof or explicit n/a with rationale
minimumDefinition.runtimeProof: runtime proof script or explicit n/a with rationale
minimumDefinition.l4Prerequisite: all associated L3 behavioural gaps are closed
minimumDefinition.proofLevelRationale: required for every proof inventory record
minimumDefinition.capabilitiesProven: array of named capabilities or empty only when the proof validates shared tool/runtime infrastructure
minimumDefinition.semanticFacetsProven: array naming the semantic facets the proof can actually support
minimumDefinition.providerClass: hermetic, compose-local, sandbox-external, live-external, or none
minimumDefinition.prodSafe: boolean; destructive proofs must be false
minimumDefinition.scriptPath: runtime proof script path or null for tests

rules: L0 Discovery Proven is inventory confidence only.
L1 Executable Proven is execution confidence only.
L2 Contract Proven cannot claim state-transition guarantees.
L3 Behaviour Proven is the current closure target.
No capability may be upgraded to L4 until all associated L3 behavioural gaps are closed.
L5 requires L4; L6 requires L5.
Destructive proofs must be dev/test/staging only.
